name: docks-plugin-tooling
description: Author-side validation tooling for the Docks plugin.

scripts.format:js: biome format --write scripts tests plugins/session-relay/test plugins/effect-kit/test plugins/docks/hooks package.json biome.json
scripts.lint:js: biome lint scripts tests plugins/session-relay/test plugins/effect-kit/test plugins/docks/hooks plugins/docks/skills/productivity/plan-reviewer/scripts plugins/docks/skills/productivity/write-skill/scripts
scripts.check:js: biome ci scripts tests plugins/session-relay/test plugins/effect-kit/test plugins/docks/hooks package.json biome.json && biome lint plugins/docks/skills/productivity/plan-reviewer/scripts plugins/docks/skills/productivity/write-skill/scripts
